description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named coverage-tests that runs on pull requests, pushes, and daily on a schedule. The workflow should have read permissions to repository contents and use a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. Set up multiple jobs for Linux, Windows, and macOS to run Python and C++ tests with test coverage, as well as a separate job for Java tests with test coverage. Each job should use micromamba to provision a Conda environment and display the environment info.
